tool_args.label: Minutes of Regular Meeting Committee on Operations - October 24, 2022

payload.title: Minutes of Regular Meeting Committee on Operations of the MTA New York City Transit Authority, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, and MTA Bus Company October 24, 2022

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Regular Meeting Committee on Operations of the MTA New York City Transit Authority, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, and MTA Bus Company
MTA's Open Stroller Program successfully launched

tool_args.label: OMNY Available for Reduced Fare Customers

payload.description: OMNY is now available for reduced fare customers
Testing for OMNY for AAR customers is underway and the pilot will be rolled out soon

tool_args.label: Free MTA-Issued Reduced Fare OMNY Cards

payload.description: MTA will provide free MTA-issued reduced fare OMNY cards beginning next year
Graduation of a new police academy class of police officers who will begin their patrol careers in subway training units

tool_args.label: Elevate Transit: Zoning for Accessibility One-Year Anniversary

payload.description: Elevate Transit: Zoning for Accessibility program recently marked its one-year anniversary. Four ADA upgrade projects were achieved in that year.
One-year anniversary noted; four ADA upgrade projects were achieved in that year
Launched in September; allows customers with strollers to board buses and park their strollers in a dedicated area
Strategies and improvements regarding the A Line discussed by Demetrius Crichlow, Senior Vice President, Subways
Increased Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) mentioned as one of the initiatives being implemented to decrease wait time and travel time

tool_args.label: Ridership Returning to Subway and Bus

payload.claim_text: Customers have been returning to the subway and bus systems, and ridership figures have increased
payload.subject: subway and bus ridership

payload.claim_text: Subways and Paratransit remained steady, while Buses decreased slightly due to increased traffic
payload.subject: Customer Satisfaction

tool_args.label: Initiatives to Decrease Wait Time and Travel Time

payload.claim_text: Several initiatives being implemented to decrease wait time and travel time, including additional bus lanes, increased Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE), completion of the bus network redesigns, and targeted improvements to specific subway and bus lines
payload.subject: decreased wait time and travel time

payload.claim_text: Measurable increases to weekend service have been achieved
payload.subject: weekend service

payload.claim_text: A new dashboard and tools have been developed by Subways to provide daily, weekly, and monthly internal review processes across multiple levels of service delivery, from maintenance to line management
payload.subject: Subways dashboard

payload.claim_text: Paratransit, as well, continues to recover and show improvements
payload.subject: Paratransit

tool_args.label: OMNY Available for Reduced Fare Customers

payload.claim_text: OMNY is now available for reduced fare customers. Any senior or customer with a disability can apply for OMNY
payload.subject: OMNY reduced fare

payload.claim_text: Increases in overall arrests, including robbery arrests and gun arrests and increases in transit-related summonses
payload.subject: NYPD arrests

payload.description: Total amount of the procurement package which included four actions

tool_args.label: Option to Purchase 640 Additional Subway Cars

payload.description: Exercise an option to purchase 640 additional subway cars and related non-car items for NYC Transit Department of Subways from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

tool_args.label: Purchase of Paratransit Buses and Vans

payload.raw_value_text: 20 Paratransit Ford Cutaway buses and 20 Paratransit Ford Transit vans
payload.description: Approve purchase of 20 Paratransit Ford Cutaway buses from Coach & Equipment Mfg. Corp. and 20 Paratransit Ford Transit vans from Fenton Mobility Products Inc.
Additional bus lanes being implemented to decrease wait time and travel time
Increased Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) to decrease wait time and travel time

payload.claim_text: Completion of the bus network redesigns is among initiatives being implemented to decrease wait time and travel time
payload.subject: bus network redesigns

payload.claim_text: Four ADA upgrade projects were achieved in that year
payload.subject: ADA upgrade projects

payload.claim_text: Benefits of OMNY include giving customers a non-cash option and allowing for new ways to track rides and payments and consolidate cards
payload.subject: OMNY

payload.claim_text: Joint efforts with the Community Fares Bureau will include disseminating crime prevention materials to riders at 20 stations
payload.subject: crime prevention materials

payload.description: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) project includes bus lane enforcement technology

tool_args.label: Open Stroller Program launched in September 2022
Procurement: subway cars from Kawasaki Rail Car

payload.description: Exercise option to purchase 640 additional subway cars and related non-car items from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc. for NYC Transit Department of Subways
Multi-agency estimated quantity contract with Plasser American Corporation for replacement parts, repair services, troubleshooting, and training for Maintenance-of-Way equipment

tool_args.label: Procurement: consulting services from C2K Partners

payload.description: Award consulting services for the R34211 Subway Car Contract to C2K Partners
Purchase of 20 Paratransit Ford Cutaway buses from Coach & Equipment Mfg. Corp.
Purchase of 20 Paratransit Ford Transit vans from Fenton Mobility Products Inc.

tool_args.label: NYPD delivers Safety & Security Report at meeting

payload.description: Jason Wilcox, Chief of Transit, NYPD delivered the Safety & Security Report
MTA's contactless fare payment system

tool_args.label: OMNY for AAR customers pilot testing
Free OMNY reduced fare cards - future event
